title: Guard Release Metadata
description: Machine-readable metadata attached to each GitHub Release, consumed by the update checker.

severity.description: critical: new deny rules or security fixes; informational: everything else.

summary.description: One-line human-readable summary of the release.

deny_rule_count.description: Number of new deny rules added since the previous release.

security_fixes.description: True if the release contains commits with fix(security) scope.

changelog_url.description: URL to the full changelog for this release.
